title: Rhizosphere Nitrogen Cycling Mechanism
subtitle: AI-native Scientific Semantic Rendering Demonstration

side_panel.title: GIS Integration
side_panel.content: Spatial monitoring enables large-scale analysis of rhizosphere activity, nitrogen transport, and crop productivity patterns across agricultural systems.

description: Microenvironment reconstruction regulates rhizosphere microbial communities, enhances nitrogen transformation efficiency, and ultimately improves crop yield formation.
